{{Infobox concept
| name = Naraka Incarnation
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

''See also: [[Naraka Incarnation Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka]] [[Incarnation]] is a powerful, noble force of nature that embodies the principles of law and order associated with its home territory. While these beings possess immense strength, staying in the world for extended periods causes them to lose their sanity and act like wild animals. Becoming a [[Naraka]] [[Incarnation]] is a difficult process that requires an individual to simultaneously desire and flee from justice. Physically, the entity is a massive creature standing ten feet tall with skin composed of volcanic stone and ash. It features glowing, ember-like eyes, hair made of living flame, and a large lizard-like tail. It is capable of extreme feats of regeneration, such as regrowing severed limbs from ash, and wields a massive burning hammer. In combat, it can project intense waves of fire and cause others to burst into flames with a howl. Historically, the [[Incarnations]] were kept imprisoned underground by [[Damasca]] for three centuries; once freed, the [[Naraka]] [[Incarnation]] sought retribution by destroying [[Bel Calem]] and much of the surrounding land. Despite their destructive potential, they act according to their inherent nature to restore balance through judgment and punishment.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Held captive within a prison in [[Malachi's realm]], the [[Naraka]] [[Incarnation]] is not a free entity. This nearly ten-foot-tall being possesses a face sculpted from hardened volcanic stone and crusty ash, complemented by orange eyes that glow like hot coals or embers. Its physical form features hair made of flame, bat-like wings of ash, and a red-scaled draconic tail. In combat, it wields a massive hammer with an obsidian shaft and a head of flame, while also utilizing the ability to blast intense waves of fire from its palms. Despite being able to regrow a severed hand from ash, the entity's body ultimately dissolves into ash upon its death.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">20</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] is not free.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] is located in [[Malachi's realm]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]]'s face is sculpted from crusty ash and hardened volcanic stone.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] has eyes that glow like hot coals.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] has hair made of flame.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] has a red-scaled draconic tail.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] is almost ten feet tall.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] wields a hammer with an obsidian shaft and a head made of flame.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] was held in a prison.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]]'s voice sounds like an angry volcano.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]]'s chuckle sounds like gargling boulders.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] is ten feet tall with ashen skin and blazing hair.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] has a lizard-tail and wields a burning hammer the size of an oak tree.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] can smell Ragnarus.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] has orange eyes that glow like embers.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] can regrow its severed hand from ash.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] has bat-like wings of ash.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] can blast intense waves of fire from its palm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] uses a hammer.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]]'s body dissolves into ash upon death.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Upon its release, the [[Naraka]] [[Incarnation]] tore [[Bel Calem]] to pieces and set much of both [[Bel Calem]] and [[Myria]] ablaze. The entity's destructive path continued as it burned down a village, and at one point, it completely leveled an entire city block within [[Bel Calem]]. Ultimately, the process of becoming a [[Naraka]] [[Incarnation]] is noted to be more difficult than becoming an [[Elysia Incarnation]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] was released and tore [[Bel Calem]] to pieces.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] burned much of [[Bel Calem]] and [[Myria]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] burned down a village.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Naraka Incarnation]] once burned an entire city block in [[Bel Calem]] to the ground.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Becoming a [[Naraka Incarnation]] is more difficult than becoming an [[Elysia Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“I smell Ragnarus,” the Incarnation grumbled, in a voice like a mountain’s.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
